name: revit_analyze_panel_areas
description: Computes divided-surface panel areas, classifies panels by area thresholds, and optionally reports or reassigns panel types.

divided_surface_ids.description: DividedSurface element ids to analyze; omit to process all in the document

min_area.description: Area below this value is classified as small

max_area.description: Area above this value is classified as large

export_path.description: Optional path for CSV or text export of panel id and area

notes: Panel type reassignment from FrmPanelArea would be an optional apply_panel_types flag; core area math lives in FormPanelArea.cs.
